beforeEnrollmentChecklist.title: 30 credits of Natural World
beforeEnrollmentChecklist.note: Credit bucket placeholder extracted from source text.

requirementGroup.label: 30 credits of Natural World
requirementGroup.sourceHeading: Science Component: 30 credits Natural World (NW) courses from anthropology, astronomy, atmospheric sciences, biology, chemistry, computer science, earth and space sciences, economics, environmental studies, mathematics, physics, psychology, and sociology, with a minimum 2.50 GPA in these courses and a minimum 2.0 grade in each course. At least 15 of the credits must be outside mathematics.

requirementGroups.label: 30 credits of Natural World
requirementGroups.sourceHeading: Science Component: 30 credits Natural World (NW) courses from anthropology, astronomy, atmospheric sciences, biology, chemistry, computer science, earth and space sciences, economics, environmental studies, mathematics, physics, psychology, and sociology, with a minimum 2.50 GPA in these courses and a minimum 2.0 grade in each course. At least 15 of the credits must be outside mathematics.

At least 15 of the credits must be outside mathematics.
